_note: Ground-truth values for the synthetic ~10k row fixture in query-history-fixture.csv (regenerated by examples/audit/generate-fixture.py, seed=42). The pct fields and bucket counts are asserted by crates/melt-audit/tests/fixture.rs within the tolerances noted there; the rest is reference-only.

routable_conservative._note: Within ±2pp of the spec §1 mockup figure (43.0%). Tuned via generate-fixture.py's --hot-share-of-routable; lowering shifts more long-tail mass outside top-N=20 and drops conservative further.
